summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AI Agent Dev Team platform. All core functionality working excellently including fal.ai integration, agent management, project workflows, and chat system.

design_issues.issue: Missing accessibility descriptions causing console warnings
affected_selectors: Dialog components in project creation and task creation

passed_tests: All 5 AI agents properly initialized (NEXUS, ATLAS, FORGE, SENTINEL, PROBE)
fal.ai integration working with real AI responses
Task management with Kanban board functionality
Chat system with team and individual agent communication
Landing page with all agent cards and navigation
Agent status updates and real-time indicators
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (28/28), Frontend: 95% (excellent core functionality with minor UI improvements needed)
